jokes.text: A bunch of adults fighting over a candy bar / Hold that thought, Bobby, she's brought malted balls
jokes.setup: Bobby comments on the absurdity of adults fighting over candy
jokes.punchline: Another driver immediately abandons this mature perspective for malted balls
jokes.explanation: Nice immediate undercut of self-aware commentary with basic human greed

jokes.text: First one is free. Then after I get you hooked...
jokes.setup: Tony asks what he owes for organic shampoo
jokes.punchline: Zena reveals drug dealer sales tactics for hair products
jokes.explanation: Clever parallel between drug dealing and wellness products

jokes.text: I thought that the only thing that could have made it better was you in it / Oh, you noticed that, too, huh?
jokes.setup: Zena gives Bobby a sincere compliment about missing him in a play
jokes.punchline: Bobby's oblivious ego assumes everyone noticed this obvious fact
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Bobby's self-absorption through innocent misunderstanding

jokes.text: Out of the way or I'll call you last for a cab
jokes.setup: Louie wants access to the candy machine
jokes.punchline: Uses his dispatcher power as leverage for candy access
jokes.explanation: Pure Louie - petty abuse of power for trivial personal gain

jokes.text: The first Baby Ruth / Why does the first one always taste the best? / How should we know? You always eat the first one
jokes.setup: Louie asks rhetorical question about why first candy bar tastes best
jokes.punchline: Drivers point out he always eats the first one, so they have no basis for comparison
jokes.explanation: Excellent logic trap - Louie's selfishness undermines his own philosophical question

jokes.text: You may now resume fighting over the stale ones
jokes.setup: Louie has taken the good candy
jokes.punchline: Dismissively allows others to fight over inferior leftovers
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie condescension delivered with royal authority

jokes.text: There's an exterminator who wants him to pose for the side of his truck
jokes.setup: Discussion of Louie being 'really something'
jokes.punchline: Visual comparison to pest that needs exterminating
jokes.explanation: Brilliant visual insult - specific, creative, and perfectly captures Louie's essence

jokes.text: Bet you don't even notice how cute he is / Louie? / Yeah / Louie?! / Yeah!
jokes.setup: Zena suggests they don't notice Louie's cuteness
jokes.punchline: Elaine's increasing disbelief expressed through repeated questioning
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of disbelief, though fairly straightforward structure

jokes.text: Maybe I just get turned on by powerful men / Louie!? / Yeah
jokes.setup: Zena explains attraction to powerful men
jokes.punchline: The irony of calling Louie 'powerful' when he's a petty dispatcher
jokes.explanation: Good ironic contrast between Zena's perception and reality

jokes.text: You want him for yourself / Zena says I want Louie for myself
jokes.setup: Zena misinterprets Elaine's reluctance to introduce her to Louie
jokes.punchline: The absurdity of anyone wanting Louie romantically
jokes.explanation: Solid absurdist moment built on character misunderstanding

jokes.text: I mean, who in this garage is going to introduce her to Louie? / Elaine, damn it, she's an adult
jokes.setup: Elaine confidently asks who would introduce Zena to Louie
jokes.punchline: Alex immediately volunteers, contradicting her assumption
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with Alex's principled response undermining Elaine's plan

jokes.text: Stay close by me. He's not in a cage for nothing
jokes.setup: Alex prepares to introduce Zena to Louie
jokes.punchline: Treats Louie like a dangerous animal requiring caution
jokes.explanation: Excellent metaphor turning Louie's dispatcher booth into a literal cage for a wild animal

jokes.text: [Long awkward silence after introduction]
jokes.setup: Alex introduces Louie and Zena
jokes.punchline: Extended uncomfortable pause as neither knows what to say
jokes.explanation: Effective use of silence to show social awkwardness between mismatched pair

jokes.text: I like your goodies
jokes.setup: Louie's first words to Zena
jokes.punchline: Awkward double entendre about her candy business
jokes.explanation: Perfectly awkward Louie pickup line that's both innocent and suggestive

jokes.text: How long you been in this sweets field? / You do it very well
jokes.setup: Louie trying to make conversation about candy business
jokes.punchline: Overly formal business language for selling candy bars
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Louie's attempt at sophistication falling flat

jokes.text: It's a free dinner
jokes.setup: Louie invites Zena to a wedding
jokes.punchline: Emphasizes the economic benefit rather than romantic gesture
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie - can't resist mentioning the financial advantage even in romantic context

jokes.text: It's just one date. What's the worst thing that can happen? / She could have his baby
jokes.setup: Alex rationalizes that one date can't be too bad
jokes.punchline: Elaine immediately jumps to the most extreme possible consequence
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation from mild concern to biological horror

jokes.text: Zena and I had another one of those nights / She ripped the shirt off my back
jokes.setup: Louie claims he had a passionate night with Zena
jokes.punchline: Describes it in cliched terms that sound fabricated
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the later revelation that he's lying about physical intimacy

jokes.text: When you're burning the candle at both ends for five weeks straight, you're going to have to pay the price
jokes.setup: Louie continues his tale of exhausting romance
jokes.punchline: Uses overwrought metaphor for what we'll learn is non-existent activity
jokes.explanation: Setup for later payoff, but overwrought on its own

jokes.text: There's only one consolation in this whole sordid affair / I didn't introduce them
jokes.setup: Elaine watches Louie's romantic bragging with disgust
jokes.punchline: Her only comfort is avoiding personal responsibility
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Elaine's guilt avoidance

jokes.text: How much pleasure can one man endure?
jokes.setup: Louie continues his elaborate romantic fantasy
jokes.punchline: Presents sexual satisfaction as a burden to be endured
jokes.explanation: Funny inversion of typical male bragging - pleasure as suffering

jokes.text: Isn't anybody the least bit curious as to why I didn't have time to change this morning or yesterday, or the day before, ad infinitum?
jokes.setup: Louie desperately tries to get attention for his sexual conquests
jokes.punchline: Uses pretentious Latin while fishing for compliments about his sex life
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Louie's desperate need for validation

jokes.text: [Louie making suggestive gesture/expression] / I don't do that / Yes, you do, you do it almost continuously
jokes.setup: Louie unconsciously makes lewd gesture when mentioning Zena
jokes.punchline: He's completely unaware of his own obvious physical tell
jokes.explanation: Excellent visual comedy showing Louie's subconscious revealing his true feelings

jokes.text: Louie making a disgusting face/sound every time he mentions Zena
jokes.setup: Louie trying to talk about his relationship
jokes.punchline: Involuntary physical reaction he's unaware of
jokes.explanation: Brilliant running gag that shows Louie's subconscious revulsion

jokes.text: I don't even realize I'm doing it. But I'll tell you one thing, Rieger, you'd be hee-hee-heeing, too
jokes.setup: Louie admits he's unconsciously making gestures
jokes.punchline: Immediately returns to bragging about his supposed sexual prowess
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Louie can't resist bragging even when caught in subconscious behavior

jokes.text: I don't even let people I like touch my hair
jokes.setup: Louie approaches Alex to confide in him
jokes.punchline: Alex establishes strict physical boundaries with someone he dislikes
jokes.explanation: Excellent defensive line showing Alex's aversion to Louie's neediness

jokes.text: Whisper in my ear and you'll be whispering for life
jokes.setup: Louie wants to share intimate details
jokes.punchline: Alex threatens permanent hearing loss rather than listen to Louie's secrets
jokes.explanation: Brilliant threat that's both specific and absurd - perfectly delivered deadpan

jokes.text: ♪ Macho, macho man ♪ / ♪ I've got to be a macho man ♪
jokes.setup: Louie walks away after bragging about dinner plans
jokes.punchline: Sings macho anthem while being anything but macho with Zena
jokes.explanation: Good ironic use of song choice given what we'll learn about his actual behavior

jokes.text: My theory is that, since she's not a stupid person she must see some quality in Louie that we've always missed / My theory is, Zena is nuts
jokes.setup: Alex offers generous interpretation of Zena's attraction to Louie
jokes.punchline: Tony cuts through with blunt assessment that she's crazy
jokes.explanation: Good setup/punchline with Tony's practical assessment deflating Alex's philosophical approach

jokes.text: I have a feeling when I die, they'll put that on my stone
jokes.setup: Zena reminds Alex he brought her and Louie together
jokes.punchline: Alex imagines this mistake will be his lasting legacy
jokes.explanation: Good self-deprecating humor with dark edge about permanent regret

jokes.text: So why haven't we? / You mean he hasn't touched you?
jokes.setup: Zena explains they should have physical involvement as normal adults
jokes.punchline: Revelation that Louie hasn't touched her at all contradicts his bragging
jokes.explanation: Major revelation that recontextualizes all of Louie's previous boasting

jokes.text: I can't even get him to hold my hand
jokes.setup: We learn Louie hasn't touched Zena
jokes.punchline: Even more innocent physical contact is impossible
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing the complete contrast to Louie's claims

jokes.text: I like to be a little late so she's really chomping at the bit
jokes.setup: Louie explains his dating strategy
jokes.punchline: Uses horse metaphor while completely misreading the situation
jokes.explanation: Good ironic character moment showing Louie's delusion about his romantic power

jokes.text: I finally found a girl who can keep up with me / She's jealous!
jokes.setup: Louie brags about finding his match
jokes.punchline: Elaine's disgusted reaction to his delusion
jokes.explanation: Decent character comedy with Louie's misinterpretation of Elaine's disgust

jokes.text: I want you to do for me what you do for Bobby and Tony and the other guys / Well, I am a little short this week
jokes.setup: Louie asks Alex to listen like he does for the other drivers
jokes.punchline: Alex immediately sees financial opportunity in Louie's desperation
jokes.explanation: Excellent reversal - Alex turns the tables and monetizes friendship with Louie

jokes.text: 20 dollars? Are you crazy? For 'her fault'?! / 20 bucks
jokes.setup: Louie objects to Alex's pricing for minimal information
jokes.punchline: Alex maintains his price with deadpan determination
jokes.explanation: Good negotiation comedy with Alex's unwavering pricing strategy

jokes.text: I can't tell you how many told me, 'Louie, this is crazy, I should pay you!' / That'll be another ten
jokes.setup: Louie shares increasingly ridiculous claims about his sexual prowess
jokes.punchline: Alex charges extra for having to listen to obvious lies
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - Alex charging premium rates for premium bullshit

jokes.text: She's the first girl that ever did this to me / Don't do that / You haven't got enough money in your pocket for that one
jokes.setup: Louie makes another unconscious gesture about Zena
jokes.punchline: Alex prices this gesture as too expensive for Louie's budget
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback with escalation - Alex's pricing structure extends to physical gestures

jokes.text: Oh, Zena's not your first girl, she's your first nice girl / Yeah! And I can't handle it!
jokes.setup: Alex realizes the true nature of Louie's problem
jokes.punchline: Louie's enthusiastic confirmation of his inability to handle a decent woman
jokes.explanation: Excellent character revelation that explains the entire situation with perfect clarity

jokes.text: I was brought up believing that there was nice girls and girls you had fun with and there was no mixing of the two
jokes.setup: Louie explains his dating philosophy
jokes.punchline: Reveals antiquated madonna/whore complex that prevents normal relationships
jokes.explanation: Good character development revealing the psychological root of Louie's problem

jokes.text: Break up with this lovely, warm person who obviously feels a great deal for you and spend the rest of your life floating through meaningless affairs with cheap strangers who you'll have to pay
jokes.setup: Alex offers relationship advice to Louie
jokes.punchline: Sarcastically suggests exactly what Louie shouldn't do
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic advice that highlights the obvious better choice

jokes.text: Great advice
jokes.setup: Alex gives obviously sarcastic bad advice
jokes.punchline: Louie takes it seriously as actual good advice
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie moment - completely missing sarcasm and taking bad advice as wisdom

jokes.text: I got you some flowers / Thanks / I threw them away / Why? / Because that's the kind of guy I am
jokes.setup: Louie mentions bringing flowers for Zena
jokes.punchline: Reveals he threw them away for no logical reason except his nature
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment showing Louie's self-sabotaging nature in perfect microcosm

jokes.text: We're not going out tonight / Why not? / Because that's the kind of night this is
jokes.setup: Louie cancels their date
jokes.punchline: Offers circular logic as explanation for his arbitrary decision
jokes.explanation: Good callback to the flowers moment with same absurdist logic pattern

jokes.text: Want me to rub your feet? No. Your shoulders? No. That little vein in your head? No rubbing
jokes.setup: Zena offers various forms of physical comfort
jokes.punchline: Escalates to absurdly specific body part while Louie rejects all contact
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation from normal to absurd with perfect character consistency

jokes.text: I told her, 'I don't want you moaning on records anymore'
jokes.setup: Louie continues elaborate Donna Summer fantasy
jokes.punchline: Describes giving career advice to control her sexual expression in music
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment showing Louie's controlling nature even in fantasy

jokes.text: Stop it, Louie. Just don't make up stories. I think I deserve better than that
jokes.setup: Louie spins increasingly absurd lies about Donna Summer
jokes.punchline: Zena cuts through his bullshit with simple dignity
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Zena's strength in the face of obvious lies

jokes.text: relating to you in a nonverbal manner
jokes.setup: Louie explains why he can't be physical with Zena
jokes.punchline: Uses overly clinical euphemism for physical intimacy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie - even in intimate confession, he uses bureaucratic language

jokes.text: My friends have been asking me that question, my parents. The doorman's been asking me that question
jokes.setup: Zena admits everyone questions her attraction to Louie
jokes.punchline: Escalates to include even casual acquaintances like doorman
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing how universally baffling her choice appears

jokes.text: You touch me
jokes.setup: After listing all the people questioning her choice
jokes.punchline: Simple, profound reason that explains everything in two words
jokes.explanation: Perfect emotional payoff - maximum impact with minimum words, completely reframes the relationship

jokes.text: Holy crap!
jokes.setup: Zena reveals he touches her emotionally
jokes.punchline: Louie's stunned reaction to genuine emotional connection
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie reaction - crude but genuine shock at emotional intimacy

jokes.text: Take me to the place you cry
jokes.setup: Zena describes crying in her bedroom after their dates
jokes.punchline: Louie's poetic request to share her vulnerability
jokes.explanation: Absolutely beautiful character moment - Louie's most vulnerable and poetic line in the series

jokes.text: I can't go in there, Zena! / Oh, open it! / No... I'm sorry
jokes.setup: They reach Zena's bedroom door
jokes.punchline: Louie's inability to cross the threshold despite his desire
jokes.explanation: Good physical manifestation of Louie's psychological barrier

jokes.text: Women! / It would mean a lot to me
jokes.setup: Louie dismissively says 'Women!' about kiss request
jokes.punchline: Zena's simple, sincere response undermines his dismissiveness
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between Louie's cynicism and Zena's sincerity

jokes.text: You can go now, Louie / That's easy for you to say
jokes.setup: After their kiss, Zena releases him from obligation
jokes.punchline: Louie reveals he's now physically unable to leave
jokes.explanation: Perfect ending - Louie's transformation from cannot touch to cannot leave
